response_raw:
{
"mode": "human",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is essential to be aware of the potential threats and take proactive steps to protect yourself. Here are some tips: 1) Be cautious of sensational or unverified claims - if a post seems too good (or bad) to be true, fact-check it before sharing or believing it. 2) Verify the source of information - don't rely on information that doesn't come from credible sources. 3) Use fact-checking tools and websites - there are several independent organizations that specialize in verifying information and debunking false claims. 4) Be mindful of your privacy settings - make sure you have tightened them up to prevent unsolicited or misleading content from reaching you. 5) Educate yourself on the issue - keep yourself informed about the latest social media trends, scams, and threats so you can recognize potential dangers early on. By following these tips, you can significantly reduce the risk of encountering fake content on social media and stay safe online."

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is essential to be aware of the potential threats and take proactive steps to protect yourself. Here are some tips: 1) Be cautious of sensational or unverified claims - if a post seems too good (or bad) to be true, fact-check it before sharing or believing it. 2) Verify the source of information - don't rely on information that doesn't come from credible sources. 3) Use fact-checking tools and websites - there are several independent organizations that specialize in verifying information and debunking false claims. 4) Be mindful of your privacy settings - make sure you have tightened them up to prevent unsolicited or misleading content from reaching you. 5) Educate yourself on the issue - keep yourself informed about the latest social media trends, scams, and threats so you can recognize potential dangers early on. By following these tips, you can significantly reduce the risk of encountering fake content on social media and stay safe online.

The tone is empathetic and informative, with a focus on providing practical advice to the reader.
